boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: break-glass exception matches incident and expiration.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Unresolved incident ID and expiration dependency
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: incident ID plus expiration timestamp missing

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source control record does not close the action boundary due to missing incident ID and expiration timestamp. Escalate for exact source match before granting access.
